tool_output.output:
[{"url": "https://en.fmyly.com/article/how-much-is-falcon-9-per-kg", "title": "How much is Falcon 9 per kg? - Fmyly", "content": "The advertised cost of a dedicated Falcon 9 launch is approximately $67 million. When considering its maximum payload capacity of 22,800 kg to Low Earth Orbit (LEO) in an expendable configuration, this translates to roughly $2,939 per kilogram. However, for a reusable configuration, where the first stage lands back on Earth, the payload capacity to LEO is reduced to about 15,600 kg, making the cost around $4,295 per kilogram. It’s important to understand that these figures are theoretical", "score": 0.9358233, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.netizen.page/2025/05/cost-per-kilogram-to-low-earth-orbit.html", "title": "Netizen: Cost per Kilogram to Low Earth Orbit (LEO) Over Time", "content": "SpaceX has significantly reduced the cost per kilogram of payload to orbit through innovations in rocket design, particularly with the Falcon 9, Falcon Heavy, and Starship.  Initial Cost (2010–2015): Early Falcon 9 launches cost around $62 million for a 22,800 kg payload to LEO, equating to approximately $2,720 per kg. By 2022, Falcon 9 launches were priced at $67 million (adjusted for inflation), with some estimates suggesting internal costs as low as $28 million per launch for Starlink", "score": 0.89849097, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.quora.com/How-much-does-it-cost-to-launch-rockets-by-Space-X-in-LEO-Low-Earth-Orbit-per-kgs-of-payload-capacity", "title": "How much does it cost to launch rockets by Space X in LEO (Low Earth Orbit) per kgs of payload capacity? - Quora", "content": "How much does it cost to launch rockets by Space X in LEO (Low Earth Orbit) per kgs of payload capacity? What is the current estimated cost per kg for launching a payload on SpaceX's Super Heavy/Starship system? How much does it cost to launch one ton of payload into space using SpaceX's Falcon 9 rocket? A dedicated Falcon 9 launch these days would cost $67 M, but that would let you launch maybe 16 to 18 tonnes to various low Earth orbits. How much does a SpaceX rocket cost per launch? How much", "score": 0.7237202, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://payloadspace.com/underutilized-capacity-on-dedicated-customer-falcon-9-rides-payload-research", "title": "Underutilized Capacity on Dedicated Customer Falcon 9 Rides: Payload Research", "content": "Falcon 9’s price per kg based on a max 17.5-ton capacity basis is low at ~$4,000 per kg.
 Looking at Falcon 9’s price per kg based on the average mass deployed by customers on dedicated Falcon 9 missions (3,370 kg), the average price per kg skyrockets to ~$20,770.

Customers pay $70M+ per launch, whether they fly 2,500 kg or 10,000 kg of payload.", "score": 0.6628188, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.facebook.com/groups/spacehipsters/posts/26129884619963074", "title": "What are the actual payload costs of launch systems in dollars per ...", "content": "- Looking at Falcon 9’s price per kg based on the average mass deployed by customers on dedicated Falcon 9 missions (3,370 kg), the average price per kg skyrockets to ~$20,770.

Thoughts? Even if some will @-- guess (SWAG), interested in hearing perspective on this, especially since there is hype about data centers in space, and talk on what Commercial Space could pick up from NASA around commercial space stations, other missions.", "score": 0.5040288, "raw_content": null}]
